findings.hint: the messages.evil API shadows the built-in messages API
findings.message:
We are currently not accepting new submissions using Experiment APIs, except unmodified copies of the latest published API drafts (https://github.com/thunderbird/webext-experiments). The following cannot be accepted:
Read more: https://thunderbird.topicbox.com/groups/addons/T6ff545fb6d479da5/temporary-pause-on-new-experiment-api-add-on-reviews
